videos.title: OMG!! I just discovered one of the biggest bakeries in London and it’s Ghanaian owned 🇬🇭❤️ @unclejohnsbakery  Ever since I came to London, I realized our Ghana style bread is actually so hard to find unless you know the right shops. So seeing Uncle John build such a massive bakery that delivers bread all across London and beyond made me SO happy and proud ❤️ Moments like this remind me why I do what I do. I’m here to spotlight and celebrate Ghanaian & African-owned food brands so more people around the world can discover them easily !!   #FoodTiktok #foryou #fyp #viral

A pet rooster climbs into his owner's bed every morning to wake him up at 7am. A video shows Rourou the rooster clattering down the hallway, jumping on the sofa and on its owner's bed to let out an ear-splitting crow. Owner Qi Wentong adopted Rourou, three, after his previous owner fell ill. Rourou has been living with Qi in Tangshan in China's Heibei Province and is allowed to roam freely around the house.  #NewsBuzzRAW

bakery style oreo stuffed cookies 🍪🥛    recipe: ingredients: ¾ cup salted butter, softened (170 g) ¾ cup packed brown sugar (150 g) ¼ cup granulated sugar (50 g) 1 large egg  1 tsp vanilla (5 g) 2 cups all-purpose flour (240 g) 1 tbsp cornstarch (8 g) ½ tsp baking soda (3 g) ¼ tsp salt (1.5 g) oreos, some whole some  roughly chopped  white chocolate (measure with your heart)  & choceur cookie and cream chocolate’s   instructions: cream the butter and sugars together  until smooth and slightly fluffy. mix in the egg and vanilla until fully combined. in a separate bowl, whisk together the flour, cornstarch, baking soda, and salt. fold the dry ingredients into the wet just until combined.  chop some of the oreos into small chunks ( leave some for topping ) and fold them in along with the white chocolate. scoop the dough into 8 portions, flatten and add an oreo inside and chocolate then shape into tall mounds. ( i flatten the top but keep them tall ) bake at 375°F for 11–14 minutes, until the edges are set and the centers are still soft. ( baking time may vary ) let cool to set the cookies!  i added moser roths white chocolate to the bottom & inside !    #oreo #cookies #chocolatechipcookies #Recipe #baking

(단순선물)  3️⃣라네즈 네오 파우더 솔직히 올영 랭킹 파우더들 다 써봤는데 얘가 찐임; 메포 저렴이 버전 느낌이라 가성비 최고야. 지성 피부들 파우더 유목민 탈출하고 싶으면 이거 꼭 써봐. (내돈내산)  #파우더추천 #지성피부꿀템 #올리브영세일 #올영추천템 #메이크업꿀팁

Bakery style chocolate chip cookies 🍪  Ingredients  3/4 cup (170g) unsalted butter, cold and cubed  3/4 cup (150g) dark brown sugar 1/3 cup (65g) granulated sugar 1 large egg + 1 egg yolk, room temp 2 tsp vanilla bean paste 2 cups (240g) all-purpose flour 1 tsp cornstarch 1 tsp espresso powder 1/2 tsp baking soda 1 tbsp milk powder  1/4 tsp baking powder 3/4 tsp salt 1 cup semi sweet chocolate chips 3/4 milk chocolate chips  Flaky sea salt for topping Method : In a bowl add all purpose flour, baking soda, baking powder, milk powder, espresso powder , corn starch and salt. Mix well to combine. In a stand mixer fitted with the paddle attachment, add the cold cubed butter, brown sugar, and granulated sugar. Mix on medium speed for about 2–3 minutes, until the mixture looks creamy.  Add the egg, egg yolk, and vanilla bean paste. Mix until fully combined, scraping down the sides of the bowl as needed. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet mixture. Mix on low speed just until combined—do not overmix. Stir in the semi-sweet and milk chocolate chips until evenly distributed.  Cover and refrigerate the dough for at least 2 hours ( or up to 24 hours for deeper flavor and thicker cookies). Preheat your oven to 350°F (175°C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper. Scoop large portions of dough (about ounce each) and roll loosely into balls. For a bakery look, keep them tall rather than flattened. Bake for 15-16 minutes, or until Edges are set and lightly golden. Centers are still soft and slightly underbaked. Sprinkle flaky sea salt on top immediately after baking. Let cookies cool on the baking sheet for 5–10 minutes before transferring to a wire rack. #cookies #cookierecipes #chocolatechip #cookierecipe

POV: when you find our halal Chinese bakery in Manchester Chinatown!  If you don’t know 99% of our Chinese bakery is fully halal! We don’t use lard, gelatine, pork or alcohol in our ingredients.  The only item we have that is not halal. Is our char siu. We don’t cook this in our bakery we have this delivered from Happy Seasons Kitchen. Which is completely separate from all our baked goods.  #chinesebakery #chinesebakeryhalal #halalbakery #halalfood #fyp

What Your Cat Thinks When You Leave Every time you walk out the door, your cat has no idea where you're going. They don't know what work or school is. To them, you're out hunting and they're just hoping you make it back safe. And the longer you're gone, the more they feel it. Cats are way more attached to you than most people think. They just show it in tiny quiet ways. If you have a cat, make sure someone checks on them when you're away for more than a day. They need more than just food and water. #cats #catbehavior #catstiktok #catfacts #PetsOfTikTok

The Bengal 🐆cat is a unique domestic breed known for its wild leopard-like appearance and highly active personality. Its coat features striking spotted or marbled patterns that resemble a miniature wild cat, making it one of the most visually exotic cat breeds in the world. Despite its wild look, the Bengal is fully domestic and forms strong bonds with its owner. This breed is highly intelligent, curious, and energetic. Bengals enjoy climbing, exploring, and interactive play, and they require mental stimulation to stay happy. They are social cats that can be very affectionate, but they also demand attention and an engaging environment. When properly cared for, the Bengal cat becomes a loyal, entertaining, and dynamic companion 🫶🏼 #bengalcat #bengalkitten #bengalkedisi #bengalcats #fypage

POV: You actually start romanticizing your education because failing is simply not an option anymore. 💸📚 We’ve all seen the „study until you’re excited for the test“ aesthetic, but let’s talk about the actual reality of academic comeback season. It’s not just about lighting a candle and opening a textbook. It’s about discipline, showing up for your future self, and upgrading the way you study. If you are still re-reading highlighted notes and wondering why nothing sticks, this is your sign to stop wasting time. The secret to actually memorizing everything without losing your mind is combining Active Recall and Spaced Repetition. It literally rewires your brain to remember information long-term. Honestly, the only way I’ve been able to stay consistent and actually romanticize my study sessions lately is by using PrettySmart. It’s an app that sets up your flashcards with built-in spaced repetition so you only review what you’re about to forget. Plus, it literally blocks your distracting apps while you study so you can actually enter that deep focus state. No more scrolling TikTok mid-lecture. 🤫 Stop playing with your potential. Lock in, block the noise, and go get that 4.0 GPA. Your future self is depending on you. 🤍 #studytok #StudyTips #skola #fyp #motivation

#mascara                                    Un mascara est un produit de maquillage destiné à être appliqué sur les cils afin de les allonger, les épaissir, les recourber et intensifier le regard. Il se présente généralement sous forme liquide ou crémeuse, contenu dans un tube avec une brosse applicatrice. Le mascara permet de donner plus de volume et de définition aux cils en les colorant, le plus souvent en noir, mais aussi en brun ou en couleurs plus originales. Selon sa formule et la forme de la brosse, il peut offrir différents effets : naturel, volumineux, allongeant ou recourbant. Facile à utiliser, il est un élément essentiel du maquillage des yeux, mais reste temporaire et s’enlève avec un démaquillant adapté.                     #lashes #prt #fyp #foryoupagе
